did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: This paper is a commentary that discusses and critiques a linked study by Goessinger et al. regarding AI in skin cancer screenings. The commentary itself does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its own results; it is a narrative review of existing literature and perspectives on AI integration in dermatology.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
